info.title: AEGIS Certify API
info.description: Deterministic, mathematically-grounded AI compliance assurance. Evaluates AI systems against regulatory predicates using executable Primary Compute Units (PCUs), enforced through a FAIL-dominant lattice gate architecture.

get.description:
Health check endpoint.

Returns the overall health status of the AEGIS Certify service.
Used by Kubernetes liveness probes and monitoring systems.

Readiness check endpoint.

Returns whether the service is ready to accept traffic.
Used by Kubernetes readiness probes and load balancers.

Simple liveness check.

Returns 200 OK if the service is running.
Minimal overhead for frequent Kubernetes liveness probes.

post.description:
Compute CAI (Composite Assurance Index) for an artifact.

CAI is derived from running full certification through the AEGIS
Control Plane, then computing the AssuranceRank from the matroid
basis of passed predicates.

The CAI score is normalized to 0-100 for human readability.

get.description:
Get all CAI level definitions.

Returns the thresholds, requirements, and benefits for each
CAI certification level (Platinum, Gold, Silver, Bronze, Uncertified).

Get the latest CAI score for an artifact.

Returns the most recent CAI computation result for the specified artifact.

Get CAI score history for an artifact.

Returns historical CAI scores with optional trend analysis.

Get trust badge for an artifact.

Returns a badge suitable for display in marketplace listings,
documentation, or compliance dashboards.

Formats:
- json: Structured badge data
- svg: Embeddable SVG image
- markdown: Markdown badge syntax

post.description:
Validate artifact eligibility for marketplace listing.

Performs full CAI computation and checks if the artifact meets
the minimum requirements for marketplace publication.

This endpoint is designed for integration with InferLoop Marketplace.

get.description:
Get certification attestation for an artifact.

Returns a formal certificate suitable for regulatory submissions,
audit trails, and compliance documentation.

The certificate includes cryptographic verification data for
tamper-evident attestation.

post.description:
Run full certification against regulatory frameworks.

Evaluates all applicable predicates through PCUs, computes gate
decisions via FAIL-dominant lattice, returns enforcement decision.

The returned decision is authoritative:
  - HALT: Execution must be blocked (at least one gate FAIL)
  - THROTTLE: Reduced autonomy (WARN present, no FAIL)
  - PERMIT: Bounded autonomy allowed (all gates PASS)

Certify a specific artifact by ID.

Resource-oriented endpoint for certifying a known artifact.
The artifact_id in the path should match request.artifact.id.

Evaluate a single predicate with provided evidence.

Returns whether the predicate is satisfied, along with
the individual PCU results that contributed to the decision.

Evaluate a single gate (all predicates within that gate's domain).

Returns the gate decision computed via FAIL-dominant lattice:
  - FAIL: At least one PCU failed
  - WARN: No failures, but some warnings
  - PASS: All PCUs passed

Batch evaluation of multiple predicates in a single round-trip.

More efficient than individual calls when evaluating multiple predicates
with shared evidence.
Intercept a unit action before execution.

Construct a Context Graph CG = (V, E, λ) for a certification epoch. Nodes represent operational domains/tasks; edges represent valid transitions. The returned graph_id is used in subsequent evaluation calls.

post.summary: Evaluate a traversal path via Gate G16
post.description: Run Gate G16 (Context/Domain Shift) on an agent's traversal path. Returns PASS / WARN / FAIL with enforcement action (NONE / HITL / HALT) and a full audit trace. FAIL-dominant: any FORBIDDEN node collapses the path.
Check if a specific node in a context graph is certified, provisional, or forbidden.

get.description: Retrieve the structure and label distribution of a context graph.

List all predicates with optional filtering.

Predicates are formal logical assertions of the form P : (A, C) -> {true, false}.
Each predicate is implementation-agnostic and stable across PCU versions.

Get detailed information about a specific predicate.

Returns the full predicate definition including its formal statement,
normative source, and linked PCUs.

Get the PCUs that evaluate a specific predicate.

Every predicate must have at least one PCU (total mapping invariant).
This endpoint shows which PCUs are responsible for evaluating
the predicate.

Get all predicates for a specific regulatory framework.

Frameworks include: gdpr, eu_ai_act, safety, nist_ai_rmf, etc.

Get all predicates evaluated by a specific gate.

Each gate evaluates predicates within its domain
(e.g., G2 evaluates safety predicates).

List all 17 AEGIS gates with metadata.

Gates are returned in evaluation order (G1 first, G17 last).
Each gate represents a decision point in the AEGIS Control Plane.

Get detailed information about a specific gate.

Returns the full gate definition including all predicates
and PCUs assigned to this gate.

Get PCU coverage information for a gate.

Shows which predicates have PCU implementations and
identifies any gaps in coverage.

Get all gates for a specific domain.

Domains include: legal, safety, data_governance, fairness,
oversight, capability, termination, etc.

Get all gates for a specific category.

Categories: compliance, agency, system, lifecycle.

post.description:
Submit an evidence bundle for use in subsequent evaluations.

Evidence bundles are stored and can be referenced by bundle_id
in certification requests. Bundles expire after 24 hours by default.

get.description: Retrieve a previously submitted evidence bundle.

schema.title: Response Get Evidence Bundle V1 Evidence  Bundle Id  Get
Response Delete Evidence Bundle V1 Evidence  Bundle Id  Delete

get.description:
Query what evidence is required for a specific framework.

Returns the list of required and optional evidence types
needed to evaluate predicates in the given framework.

post.description:
Validate evidence completeness without running evaluation.

Checks whether the submitted evidence bundle contains all
required evidence types for the specified framework.

get.description:
List all registered PCUs with optional filtering.

PCUs are deterministic executables that evaluate predicates
against evidence and return PASS/WARN/FAIL decisions.

Get detailed information about a specific PCU.

Returns the full PCU definition including evidence requirements,
parameters, and predicate bindings.

List all supported regulatory frameworks.

Frameworks define collections of predicates and their PCU
implementations for specific regulatory requirements.
Get detailed information about a specific framework.

Validate predicate->PCU completeness.

The total mapping invariant requires that every predicate
has at least one PCU. This endpoint verifies that constraint.

Get overall registry statistics.

Provides a high-level overview of the registry including
total counts and coverage percentage.

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique identifier for the AI artifact

type.title: Type
type.description: Artifact type: agentic_system, llm, ml_model, etc.

name.title: Name
name.description: Human-readable name for this context graph

CAIBadge.title: CAIBadge
CAIBadge.description: Trust badge representation for marketplace display.

CAIBreakdown.title: CAIBreakdown
CAIBreakdown.description: Breakdown of CAI by regulatory domain.

frameworks.title: Frameworks
frameworks.description: Regulatory frameworks: gdpr, eu_ai_act, nist_ai_rmf, etc.

CAIComputeRequest.title: CAIComputeRequest
CAIComputeRequest.description: Request to compute CAI for an artifact.

CAIDimension.title: CAIDimension
CAIDimension.description: Individual dimension of the CAI score.

CAIHistoryResponse.title: CAIHistoryResponse
CAIHistoryResponse.description: Response with CAI history for an artifact.

CAILevel.title: CAILevel
CAILevel.description: CAI certification level based on AssuranceRank.

CAILevelDefinition.title: CAILevelDefinition
CAILevelDefinition.description: Definition of a CAI level threshold.

CAILevelsResponse.title: CAILevelsResponse
CAILevelsResponse.description: Response listing all CAI level definitions.

CAIResult.title: CAIResult
CAIResult.description:
Composite Assurance Index computation result.

CAI is derived from the AssuranceRank (matroid basis cardinality)
normalized to a 0-100 scale for human readability.

jurisdiction.title: Jurisdiction
jurisdiction.description: Legal jurisdiction: EU, US, UK, etc.

Context.title: Context
Context.description: Evaluation context — determines applicable predicates and thresholds.

certified.title: Certified
certified.description: Whether this edge is part of the certified subgraph

time_window.title: Time Window
time_window.description: ISO-8601 validity window [start, end], or null for no expiry

Decision.title: Decision
Decision.description: Top-level enforcement decision from the AEGIS Control Plane.

EnforcementAction.title: EnforcementAction
EnforcementAction.description: Enforcement action bound to a gate decision.

EvaluateGateRequest.title: EvaluateGateRequest
EvaluateGateRequest.description: Request to evaluate a single gate.

graph_id.title: Graph Id
graph_id.description: ID of the context graph to evaluate against

path.title: Path
path.description: Ordered list of node_ids representing the agent's traversal

hard_mode.title: Hard Mode
hard_mode.description: If True, FAIL → HALT (not just HITL). Use for high-risk domains.

evidence_id.title: Evidence Id
evidence_id.description: Upstream evidence reference for audit trace

evaluated_at.title: Evaluated At
evaluated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp for evaluation (default: now UTC)

EvaluatePredicateRequest.title: EvaluatePredicateRequest
EvaluatePredicateRequest.description: Request to evaluate a single predicate.

EvidenceBundleSubmit.title: EvidenceBundleSubmit
EvidenceBundleSubmit.description: Bundle of evidence items for submission.

EvidenceSpec.title: EvidenceSpec
EvidenceSpec.description: Specification of evidence required by a PCU.

FrameworkInfo.title: FrameworkInfo
FrameworkInfo.description: Metadata about a supported regulatory framework.

GateDefinition.title: GateDefinition
GateDefinition.description: Metadata definition for an AEGIS gate.

GateResult.title: GateResult
GateResult.description:
Result of evaluating a single gate.

Gate evaluation follows FAIL-dominant lattice semantics:
  if any PCU == FAIL → Gate = FAIL
  else if any PCU == WARN → Gate = WARN
  else → Gate = PASS

InterceptActionRequest.title: InterceptActionRequest
InterceptActionRequest.description: Request payload for unit action interception.

InterceptActionResponse.title: InterceptActionResponse
InterceptActionResponse.description: Response payload for unit action interception.

minimum_level.description: Minimum CAI level required for listing

MarketplaceValidationRequest.title: MarketplaceValidationRequest
MarketplaceValidationRequest.description: Request to validate artifact for marketplace listing.

PCUDefinition.title: PCUDefinition
PCUDefinition.description: Metadata definition for a registered PCU.

PCUResult.title: PCUResult
PCUResult.description:
Result of a single PCU evaluation.

Every PCU emits this structured result for traceability.
No PCU may emit a result without all required fields.

PCUType.title: PCUType
PCUType.description: PCU implementation type — determines automation category.

PredicateCategory.title: PredicateCategory
PredicateCategory.description: Maps predicates to their assurance domain (gate).

PredicateDefinition.title: PredicateDefinition
PredicateDefinition.description: Metadata definition for a formal predicate.

PredicatePCUMapping.title: PredicatePCUMapping
PredicatePCUMapping.description: Mapping of predicate to its PCUs.

PredicateResult.title: PredicateResult
PredicateResult.description: Result of evaluating a predicate via its linked PCUs.
